taxonomy: Protium picramnioides is classified within the family Burseraceae. It is a species of Protium, a genus of flowering plants. The family Burseraceae is a group of flowering plants that are commonly known as the "torchwood family." This family is part of the order Sapindales, which also includes other families such as Anacardiaceae and Meliaceae. The classification of Protium picramnioides is based on its morphological characteristics and molecular phylogenetic analysis.
